items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 110.0 mph at a 22.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Tampa Bay Rays, KC 12, TB 5. Nick Loftin led the night, 4-5 | HR, 2 RBI, 4 R in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.0 mph.
items.title: Royals at Rays Recap
